title: GraphMutationEvent
description: One SSE event per graph_mutations row. event_id = graph_mutations.id (bigserial). Per-user commit order when advisory lock held (ADR 0008). Not a transaction-level batch envelope.

event_id.description: graph_mutations.id (bigserial) as decimal string — SSE Last-Event-ID cursor; avoids JS safe-integer loss

mutation_txn_id.description: Groups rows committed in the same graph-write transaction

mutation_type.description: Typed operation e.g. TransferPoints, CreatePlanStep, MarkPlanStale

target_table.description: Affected typed-graph table name when row-level target applies

summary.description: Human-readable typed summary — not inter-agent prose

before.description: Prior field snapshot (jsonb); may include version for OCC tables
